events.name: Manchester United at Brighton & Hove Albion

headlines.description: Table toppers Brighton beat Manchester United 2-1 on Saturday to stay undefeated in the Premier League, with João Pedro scoring the winner in the fifth minute of added time.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brighton snatch late win over Man United

events.name: West Ham United at Crystal Palace

headlines.description: A pair of second-half goals from Tomas Soucek and Jarrod Bowen gave West Ham United their first Premier League win of the season as they cruised to a 2-0 victory over Crystal Palace at Selhurst Park on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: West Ham punish Palace with 2-0 Premier League win

headlines.description: Goals from Emile Smith Rowe and Alex Iwobi gave Fulham a 2-1 home victory over promoted Leicester City in the Premier League on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Fulham beat Leicester for first points of season

headlines.description: Manchester City scored a flurry of three goals in less than four minutes to beat newly-promoted Ipswich Town 4-1 in the Premier League on Saturday, roaring back from a shock start at Etihad Stadium.
headlines.shortLinkText: Haaland nets hat trick as Man City's rout Ipswich

headlines.description: Newly-promoted Southampton's difficult start to life back in the Premier League continued when they slipped to a 1-0 loss at home to Nottingham Forest on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Forest earn first win of season over Southampton

headlines.description: Goalkeeper Jordan Pickford's error and Son Heung-min's brace helped Tottenham Hotspur to a comprehensive 4-0 victory over hapless Everton in the Premier League on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Son double eases Spurs to 4-0 win over Everton

headlines.description: Second-half goals by Leandro Trossard and Thomas Partey earned Arsenal earn a hard-fought 2-0 win at Aston Villa on Saturday as Mikel Arteta's side continued their perfect start to the Premier League season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Trossard, Raya help Arsenal get revenge on Villa
